entities.name: V
entities.context: Responded primarily as a friend during emotional processing, normalizing reactions and reinforcing perspective

entities.name: Grief-like arc
entities.context: Framework describing emotional stages: shock → anger → rumination → gradual acceptance → problem-solving

entities.name: Reframing
entities.context: Technique used to shift perspective from life sentence to experiment

entities.name: Controllable levers
entities.context: Framework emphasizing focus on manageable factors: food, stress, sleep, movement rather than perfection

relationships.context: Applied reframing to help process diagnosis as experiment rather than life sentence
Emphasized focusing on controllable factors over perfection
Emotional processing arc culminates in problem-solving through reframing
